title: bulk adding product to the quote

posts.author: aaryan.gupta (Aaryan Gupta)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

we have more than 1000 skus. I am looking for easy way to select multiple products from the catalog and bulk add it to the quote. currently I have to select product one by one which is very tedious.

What are you trying to achieve

easy way to add the multiple products into the quote for pricing.
